page_description: Every day, a guided workout with no equipment. 8 training formats, 25-40 min. Free to start, premium to go further.

today_card.heading: Today's session
today_card.load_error_hint: Check your connection and try again.

ai_card.heading: Custom session
ai_card.description: AI generates a session tailored to your preferences and level.

program_card.description: A structured plan over several weeks to keep progressing.

hero.subtitle: A guided session every day, 8 varied formats, 25-40 min. Free to start, premium to go further.

how_it_works.heading: How it works
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Today's session, free format, or a program — you decide.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Guided exercises, built-in timer, automatic transitions.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: History, stats, and programs to keep pushing further.

feature_today.label: Today's session
feature_today.body: No need to think. You open the app, your session is waiting — with a different format every day.
feature_today.bullet_1: 8 varied formats: HIIT, EMOM, Circuit, Tabata…

feature_player.label: Guided workout
feature_player.body: Timer, rep counter, automatic transitions — the player handles everything so you can stay focused on the effort.

feature_ai.label: Custom AI
feature_ai.body: Artificial intelligence generates sessions and programs tailored to your preferences, level, and goals.
feature_ai.bullet_3: Adapts to your feedback and current form

feature_programs.label: Guided programs
feature_programs.body: Follow a complete program with built-in progression, detailed tracking, and sessions adapted to each stage.
feature_programs.bullet_3: Custom programs to reach your goals
